name: Insectipede
short_description: Time to bug out and blast back in this arcade shooter packed with waves of insects and UFOs. Fight through 50 challenging stages, grab power-ups, and chase the high score.
detailed_description:
Time to bug out—because the bug-blasting arcade action is here. Blast through waves of insects and incoming UFOs as each stage cranks up the pressure.

With 50 challenging stages bursting with vibrant color, every run is a push for cleaner clears, tighter dodges, and higher scores. Scoop up power-ups, survive the waves, and see how long you can keep your name near the top.

Features

  • Bug-blasting arcade action

  • 50 challenging stages to conquer

  • Waves of insects and UFOs to battle

  • Power-ups to boost your firepower

  • Arcade high scores to chase and master

  • Fast, replayable stage-based gameplay

  • Gamepad support
